title: Vibrant Northern Irish Seaweed Salad
description: A crisp, briny salad made with dehydrated seaweed, tarragon leaves, and fresh vegetables for a refreshing, satvik-friendly bite.
instructions: Rinse the dehydrated seaweed with warm water until it rehydrates and softens, then squeeze out excess moisture and set aside.
Toss the rehydrated seaweed with fresh tarragon leaves, cucumber slices, red onion and cherry tomato halves in a large bowl.
Whisk together olive oil, apple cider vinegar, sea salt and black pepper to make a simple vinaigrette.
Pour the vinaigrette over the salad and gently toss to coat all ingredients evenly.
Add capers to the salad and give a final light toss.
Refrigerate the salad for 5 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Serve chilled as a side dish or light lunch.
Garnish with additional tarragon leaves if desired.
